summary: Blackout Override | Overrides | Verify Overrides Page UI Elements and Column Headers
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Overrides" tab
Then the user should land on the Overrides page
And the user should see the "Blackout Override", "User Lookup" and "Overrides" on top of the page
And the user should see a "+Create Override" button, a "Search" box, and a "View" (Toggle Columns) button in the top right corner
And the user should see a table with the following columns:
"Country Code", "Okta ID", "IP Address", "Zip Code", "Status", "Expiration", "Created At"
And the user should see pagination in the following format:
||*AND the user should see pagination below the table*|"Rows per page" dropdown (default set to 25)|
||*AND the user should see pagination below the table*|A pagination summary (e.g "1-25" of X")|
||*AND the user should see pagination below the table*|First, Previous, Next and Last button|

steps.action: When the user clicks on the "Overrides" tab
